---
title: "Kwai"
platform_slug: "kwai"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
    EU: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
    UK: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
---

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("kwai")
```

Kwai was assessed under both the UGC and ADS frameworks across the BR, EU, and UK scopes, with all three drawing from the same global dataset. Across both frameworks, every assessment criterion received a negative response: all four UGC special criteria (UGC_SC1–SC4), which together carry 75% of the UGC score weight, returned "no," as did all three ADS special criteria (AD_SC1–AD_SC3), which carry 75% of the ADS score weight. Kwai provides neither a public API enabling programmatic access to user-generated content [@Hale_2024_AnalyzingMisinformation] nor any graphical interface for data access, and it does not operate an advertising repository in any assessed jurisdiction; a brief political-ad transparency tool launched in Brazil was discontinued within approximately one month of its launch [@nobrega_kwai_2024]. All secondary criteria across accessibility, compliance, completeness, consistency, relevance, timeliness, and accuracy likewise scored "no." Both frameworks therefore produce a score of 0, placing Kwai in the Not Available band, which renders systematic, independent research into platform content and advertising on Kwai infeasible under the conditions assessed.

## Detailed Assessment


## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="kwai",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="kwai",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
